title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and multiple injuries.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence and its impact on community spaces, raising concerns about public safety.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host the 2026 Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte as a hub for polymer technology and innovation, fostering industry collaboration.

title: Suspect Arrested in Stabbing of Pregnant Woman in Charlotte
summary: Police have apprehended the suspect in the stabbing of a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about violent crime and the safety of vulnerable individuals in public spaces.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman at Harris Teeter
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte Harris Teeter parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about repeat offenders and the effectiveness of the justice system.

title: Charlotte Airport Worker Accused of Stealing Jewelry from Luggage
summary: An airport contractor in Charlotte is accused of stealing $5,000 worth of jewelry from a traveler's suitcase and selling it on Facebook.
charlotte_impact: Undermines trust in airport security and raises concerns about theft within the travel industry.

title: Debt as a Metaphor for Drought in the Carolinas
summary: The article draws a parallel between the difficulty of escaping debt and the persistent drought conditions in the Carolinas.
charlotte_impact: Offers a unique perspective on the drought, linking it to broader economic challenges.

title: Charlotte Water Implements Mandatory Water Restrictions
summary: Charlotte Water has implemented mandatory water restrictions due to worsening drought conditions in the Carolinas.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the severity of the drought and the need for residents to conserve water.

title: Charlotte Protestors Target Duke Energy Over Proposed Rate Increase
summary: Protestors in Charlotte are opposing Duke Energy's proposed 18% rate increase, which would significantly raise residential customer bills.
charlotte_impact: Reflects public concern over rising energy costs and the impact on household budgets.

title: Greg Biffle Posthumously Awarded North Carolina Honor
summary: Greg Biffle posthumously received the Order of the Long Leaf Pine for his heroism during Hurricane Helene.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes acts of bravery and community service, honoring individuals who made a difference.

summary: An "emergency situation" at a Walmart in Hudson led to evacuations and a large police presence.

title: Mecklenburg County Parks Issue Burn Ban Amid Drought
summary: Mecklenburg County Park and Recreation has implemented a mandatory burn ban across its park system due to severe drought conditions.

title: Chilly Weekend Ahead: Rain Expected in Charlotte
summary: Charlotte is expecting a cooler weekend with light to moderate rain on Saturday morning.

title: Death Investigation Underway in South Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a death on Shady Oak Trail in south Charlotte.

title: NC Teachers Rally for Better Pay and Funding
summary: Thousands of educators, parents, and students rallied in Raleigh for increased funding for public schools and higher teacher pay.
